---
title: "Uniform Titles and Variants"
hide-description: false
description: ""
---

```{r}
#| label = "source-index",
#| include = FALSE
source("init.R")
source("title_uniform.R")
```

MARC: [240a](https://www.loc.gov/marc/bibliographic/bd240.html)


## Complete Dataset Overview

[Unique accepted entries](dataTable/data_table.html?path=https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/title_uniform_accepted.csv): `r length(unique(df[[field]]))`

[Unique discarded entries in original data](dataTable/data_table.html?path=https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/title_uniform_discarded.csv) (excluding NA cases): `r as.vector(countLines(file_discarded) - 1)`

Original documents with non-NA titles: `r sum(!is.na(df[[field]]))` / `r nrow(df)` (`r round(100*mean(!is.na(df[[field]])), 1)`%)

Original documents with missing (NA) titles `r sum(is.na(df[[field]]))` / `r nrow(df)` documents (`r round(100*mean(is.na(df[[field]])), 1)`%)

[Download unifrom title field harmonized dataset](https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/title_uniform.csv)

## Subset Analysis: 1809-1917

[Unique accepted entries (1809-1917)](dataTable/data_table.html?path=https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/title_uniform_accepted_19.csv): `r length(unique(df_19[[field]]))`

[Download uniform title field harmonized dataset (1809-1917)](https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/title_uniform_19.csv)

Top-`r ntop` titles and their title counts for 1809-1917 period.

```{r}
#| label = "summarytitle-title-uniform",
#| echo = FALSE,
#| message = FALSE,
#| warning = FALSE,
#| fig.width = 8,
#| fig.height = 6
library(ggplot2)
theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 12))
p <- top_plot(df_19, "title_uniform", ntop = ntop, log10 = TRUE)+
  labs(y = "Entries (n)", title = "Top uniform titles (field 240)")
print(p)
```


MARC: [130a](https://www.loc.gov/marc/bibliographic/bd130.html)

```{r}
#| include = FALSE
source("title_uniform_130.R")
```
 

## Complete Dataset Overview for fiels 130.

[Unique accepted entries](dataTable/data_table.html?path=https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/title_uniform_130_accepted.csv): `r length(unique(df[[field]]))`

[Unique discarded entries in original data](dataTable/data_table.html?path=https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/title_uniform_130_discarded.csv) (excluding NA cases): `r as.vector(countLines(file_discarded) - 1)`

Original documents with non-NA titles: `r sum(!is.na(df[[field]]))` / `r nrow(df)` (`r round(100*mean(!is.na(df[[field]])), 1)`%)

Original documents with missing (NA) titles `r sum(is.na(df[[field]]))` / `r nrow(df)` documents (`r round(100*mean(is.na(df[[field]])), 1)`%)

[Download unifrom title field harmonized dataset](https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/title_uniform_130.csv)

## Subset Analysis: 1809-1917

[Unique accepted entries (1809-1917)](dataTable/data_table.html?path=https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/title_uniform_130_accepted_19.csv): `r length(unique(df_19[[field]]))`

[Download uniform title field harmonized dataset (1809-1917)](https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/title_uniform_130_19.csv)

Top-`r ntop` titles and their title counts for 1809-1917 period.

```{r}
#| label = "summarytitle-title-uniform-130",
#| echo = FALSE,
#| message = FALSE,
#| warning = FALSE,
#| fig.width = 8,
#| fig.height = 6
library(ggplot2)
theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 12))
p <- top_plot(df_19, "title_uniform_130", ntop = ntop, log10 = TRUE)+
  labs(y = "Entries (n)", title = "Top uniform titles (field 130)")
print(p)
```



MARC: [246a](https://www.loc.gov/marc/bibliographic/bd240.html)

```{r}
#| include = FALSE
source("variant_title_246.R")
```

## Complete Dataset Overview

[Unique accepted entries](dataTable/data_table.html?path=https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/variant_title_246_accepted.csv): `r length(unique(df[[field]]))`

[Unique discarded entries in original data](dataTable/data_table.html?path=https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/variant_title_246_discarded.csv) (excluding NA cases): `r as.vector(countLines(file_discarded) - 1)`

Original documents with non-NA titles: `r sum(!is.na(df[[field]]))` / `r nrow(df)` (`r round(100*mean(!is.na(df[[field]])), 1)`%)

Original documents with missing (NA) titles `r sum(is.na(df[[field]]))` / `r nrow(df)` documents (`r round(100*mean(is.na(df[[field]])), 1)`%)

[Download unifrom title field harmonized dataset](https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/variant_title_246.csv)

## Subset Analysis: 1809-1917

[Unique accepted entries (1809-1917)](dataTable/data_table.html?path=https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/variant_title_246_accepted_19.csv): `r length(unique(df_19[[field]]))`

[Download uniform title field harmonized dataset (1809-1917)](https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/variant_title_246_19.csv)

Top-`r ntop` titles and their title counts for 1809-1917 period.

```{r}
#| label = "summarytitle-variant-title",
#| echo = FALSE,
#| message = FALSE,
#| warning = FALSE,
#| fig.width = 15,
#| fig.height = 8
library(ggplot2)
theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 12))
p <- top_plot(df_19, "variant_title_246", ntop = ntop, log10 = TRUE)+
  labs(y = "Entries (n)", title = "Top variant titles")
print(p)
```
